response.justification: While Bogdan is a highly accomplished Staff Software Engineer with top-tier tech company experience (Google, Meta), his expertise lies primarily in web and full-stack development (TypeScript, Node.js, DLang) rather than C++ and industrial automation. He lacks the required recent C++ expertise, industrial cybersecurity background (IEC 62443), and specific domain experience necessary for this Senior Manager role in automation machinery.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering experience, including Staff-level roles at top-tier companies like Google and Meta.
Proven expertise in designing highly scalable, event-driven architectures and distributed microservices.
Possesses several advantageous skills requested, including deep familiarity with Node.js, React, and REST API development.
concerns: Lacks the core technical requirement of deep C++ expertise, with only 7 months of professional C++ experience dating back to 2015.
No demonstrated experience in industrial automation, IoT protocols (Modbus, MQTT, OPC UA), or machinery manufacturing.
Missing critical industrial cybersecurity knowledge, specifically IEC 62443 standards and Secure Development Lifecycle (SDL) practices.
